//: BrighterScript compiler config — drives `npm run check` and the VS Code BrightScript Language extension. Project root is the channel root, files: lists the entries Roku's bundler reads at install time. The default rootDir + files glob is fine but we name them explicitly so a stray .brs in (say) scripts/ doesn't get type-checked as channel code.
//diagnosticFilters: Suppress noise. 1011 = same-component-name (we do this intentionally; bsc misreads our setup). 1067 = unknown-roku-component (fires on Keyboard/MiniKeyboard which exist on real Roku but aren't in bsc's component DB).
